value.found_quote: **`unsandboxed`** | `unsandboxed(prefix)` or `unsandboxed(*)` | Matches commands by exact word/token prefix. Commands matching this grant will be executed outside of container isolation (only applicable when terminal sandboxing is enabled).
value.rationale: The page describes the `unsandboxed` permission action as part of Google's Antigravity CLI Fine-Grained Permissions Engine, explicitly stating that matching commands "will be executed outside of container isolation (only applicable when terminal sandboxing is enabled)," directly substantiating the claim. It is presented as a current capability with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
